name: PAY_TMPLT_RULES_VL
query: SELECT b.RULE_ID, b.RULE_NAME, b.MODULE_ID, b.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, b.RULE_OPTIONS_TYPE, b.RULE_OPTIONS_VALUE, b.RULE_TYPE, b.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, b.LEGISLATION_CODE, b.ENTERPRISE_ID, b.CREATED_BY, b.CREATION_DATE, b.LAST_UPDATED_BY, b.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, b.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, b.BASE_RULE_ID, tl.RULE_TXT, b.DEFAULT_VALUE, b.TEMPLATE_ID, b.RULE_OPTION_ATTRIBUTE_ID RULE_OPTION_ATTRIBUTE_ID, b.RULE_DISPLAY_TYPE RULE_DISPLAY_TYPE, b.RULE_OPTION_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE RULE_OPTION_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE FROM PAY_TMPLT_RULES b, PAY_TMPLT_RULES_TL tl WHERE b.RULE_ID = tl.RULE_ID AND USERENV('LANG') = tl.LANGUAGE
